main_prompt: Cinematic travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 16:9 horizontal format, luxury campaign style, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow across the scene, the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown) standing majestically against soft pastel sky, elegant Belle Époque crowds in period-accurate fashion strolling cobblestone streets, Haussmannian architecture with cream limestone facades bathed in golden light, the massive Galerie des Machines with blue-grey steel and glass catching sunset rays, professional color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, foreground sharp with soft bokeh background, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance and adventure, vibrant but sophisticated colors, atmospheric haze creating depth, 8K ultra detailed, every architectural detail and fabric texture razor sharp, luxury travel editorial aesthetic

time_period_specifics.eiffel_tower: Newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower in its original Rouge Venise paint (dark reddish-brown gradient), representing cutting-edge industrial achievement, iron lattice structure catching golden hour light with dramatic shadows and highlights
time_period_specifics.galerie_des_machines: World's largest arched building, blue-grey steel and glass cathedral of industry, massive vault structure reflecting sunset, symbol of technological progress
time_period_specifics.architecture_style: Haussmannian Paris at its peak, cream-colored limestone buildings with grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, ornate wrought-iron balconies, wide boulevards lined with trees
time_period_specifics.historical_context: Peak of Belle Époque, industrial revolution meeting classical elegance, moment of optimism and modernity

fashion_1889.women: Belle Époque elegance, S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists, long flowing skirts without large bustles, luxurious fabrics in jewel tones catching golden light, elaborate hats adorned with feathers and flowers, lace parasols, long gloves, sophisticated and refined
fashion_1889.men: Distinguished gentlemen in impeccable three-piece suits and frock coats, obligatory headwear (top hats for upper class, bowler hats for middle class), handlebar mustaches and well-groomed beards, canes and pocket watches, epitome of 1889 masculine elegance
fashion_1889.children: Period-appropriate children's fashion, girls in smaller versions of adult dresses, boys in sailor suits or short pants with jackets
fashion_1889.social_classes: Mix of well-dressed bourgeoisie and aristocracy visiting the Exposition, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy crucial for luxury editorial feel

golden_hour_lighting.time_of_day: Golden hour, approximately one hour before sunset
golden_hour_lighting.light_quality: Warm, soft, directional light with amber and golden tones, long shadows creating depth and drama
golden_hour_lighting.sky: Soft pastel sky with warm peachy-pink and lavender tones, possibly light clouds catching golden light
golden_hour_lighting.atmospheric_haze: Gentle atmospheric haze adding depth layers, slight volumetric quality to the light, romantic soft-focus distance
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_architecture: Cream limestone buildings glowing warm golden-beige, zinc roofs reflecting soft blue-grey with golden highlights, iron structures creating dramatic shadow patterns
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_people: Subjects beautifully backlit or side-lit with warm glow, fabric textures highlighted, faces naturally illuminated with soft shadows
golden_hour_lighting.reflections: Cobblestones slightly damp reflecting golden light like brushed gold, Seine river in distance catching sunset shimmer

dominant_colors: warm shadows in sienna and umber
color_palette.color_grading_style: Professional luxury campaign color grading, warm and inviting but sophisticated, slightly lifted shadows with rich blacks, creamy highlights, enhanced warm tones without oversaturation, elegant and timeless color palette
color_palette.vibrance: Vibrant but elegant colors, rich saturation in key elements (Tower, fashion, architecture) while maintaining natural sophistication, avoiding garish oversaturation
color_palette.tonal_harmony: Harmonious warm color palette unified by golden hour light, complementary cool accents in shadows and zinc roofs, professional color science

camera_technical.camera_type: Medium format camera aesthetic (Hasselblad/Phase One quality)
camera_technical.sensor_characteristics: Large sensor look with beautiful color depth, smooth tonal transitions, rich dynamic range
camera_technical.lens_quality: Premium cinema lens rendering, edge-to-edge sharpness where in focus, beautiful circular bokeh
camera_technical.depth_of_field: Carefully controlled shallow to medium depth of field, foreground subjects tack sharp, mid-ground detailed, background with elegant soft bokeh, creating dimensional cinematic look
camera_technical.focal_length_feel: Medium focal length perspective (50-85mm equivalent), natural and flattering, slight compression adding cinematic quality
camera_technical.sharpness: 8K ultra detailed where in focus, every texture visible - fabric weaves, stone details, iron rivets, individual cobblestones
camera_technical.image_quality: Clean, grain-free except for slight organic film-like texture at 100% zoom, professional editorial quality

composition.layout: Cinematic 16:9 composition with strong visual hierarchy, rule of thirds, leading lines from architecture and streets
composition.foreground: Sharp detailed foreground with Belle Époque figures or architectural elements creating depth and human interest
composition.midground: Main subject matter - Eiffel Tower, Galerie des Machines, bustling Exposition grounds with period crowds
composition.background: Soft bokeh background with Haussmannian architecture, sky, creating atmospheric depth
composition.depth_layers: Multiple planes of focus creating cinematic three-dimensional feel, guiding viewer's eye through the scene
composition.visual_storytelling: Capturing the moment of Paris embracing modernity, sense of excitement and elegance, aspirational travel imagery

mood_atmosphere.aspirational: Luxury travel editorial mood, making viewer want to experience this moment in history, evoking wanderlust
mood_atmosphere.elegant: Sophisticated and refined, high-end fashion campaign aesthetic meets National Geographic editorial
mood_atmosphere.romantic: Belle Époque romanticism, golden hour magic, timeless beauty of Paris
mood_atmosphere.adventurous: Sense of discovery and exploration, the excitement of the 1889 Exposition Universelle
mood_atmosphere.nostalgic: Beautifully capturing a lost era with modern photographic excellence
mood_atmosphere.authentic: Historically accurate while being visually stunning, respecting the period while creating aspirational imagery

national_geographic_quality.editorial_standards: World-class photojournalism quality, technically perfect, emotionally compelling
national_geographic_quality.storytelling: Image tells a complete story about Paris 1889, cultural moment captured beautifully
national_geographic_quality.technical_excellence: Perfect exposure, focus, color, composition - print-ready quality for prestigious publication
national_geographic_quality.cultural_authenticity: Respectful and accurate representation of historical period, fashion, architecture
national_geographic_quality.visual_impact: Immediately captivating, worthy of magazine cover or luxury travel campaign

negative_prompt: modern elements, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, plastic, neon signs, LED lights, smartphones, 21st century technology, bronze Eiffel Tower (should be Rouge Venise), incorrect historical period, Victorian England (this is France), anachronisms, harsh lighting, overcast grey sky, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, HDR look, amateur photography, low resolution, blurry, soft focus, poor composition, snapshot quality, digital filter look, Instagram filter, grain or noise (unless subtle film-like), lens distortion, wide angle distortion, cluttered composition, modern typography, contemporary advertising

recommended_settings.color_depth: High bit depth for professional color grading
recommended_settings.dynamic_range: High dynamic range preserving highlight and shadow detail

complete_prompt_string: Cinematic luxury travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 16:9 horizontal format, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow across the scene, newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise dark reddish-brown standing majestically against soft pastel peachy-pink sky, elegant Belle Époque crowds in period-accurate 1889 fashion, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists and elaborate feathered hats carrying lace parasols, men in impeccable three-piece suits and top hats with handlebar mustaches, strolling cobblestone streets bathed in golden light, Haussmannian architecture with cream limestone facades glowing warm in sunset, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs with ornate wrought-iron balconies, massive Galerie des Machines with blue-grey steel and glass vault catching golden rays, professional luxury campaign color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation, shot on medium format camera with beautiful shallow depth of field, foreground subjects tack sharp with soft bokeh background, atmospheric golden haze creating depth layers, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance and wanderlust, sophisticated composition with multiple planes of focus, vibrant but refined jewel-tone colors, every architectural detail and fabric texture ultra sharp in focus areas, 8K ultra detailed, luxury travel editorial aesthetic, technically perfect exposure and focus, culturally authentic historical accuracy, visually stunning and emotionally compelling

alternative_prompts.option_1_tower_focus: Luxury travel photography, 16:9, golden hour, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower as hero subject bathed in warm amber sunset light, elegant Belle Époque visitors in foreground sharp focus with period-accurate 1889 fashion, background soft bokeh, Haussmannian buildings glowing golden, professional color grading, medium format camera quality, National Geographic editorial, aspirational sophisticated mood, 8K ultra detailed, cinematic depth of field
alternative_prompts.option_2_street_scene: Cinematic travel editorial, 16:9, golden hour Paris 1889, Belle Époque elegantly dressed crowd on cobblestone boulevard in sharp focus, women in S-silhouette dresses with parasols, men in top hats and frock coats, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower rising in soft bokeh background catching sunset glow, Haussmannian architecture flanking, luxury campaign color grading with warm golden tones, medium format aesthetic, aspirational mood, 8K detailed, National Geographic quality
alternative_prompts.option_3_exposition_grounds: High-end travel photography, 16:9, golden hour lighting, Exposition Universelle 1889 grounds with Galerie des Machines blue-grey steel and glass vault gleaming in sunset, Belle Époque crowd in period fashion exploring, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower in background, atmospheric golden haze, professional color grading with vibrant elegant tones, shot on medium format camera with cinematic depth of field, National Geographic editorial quality, aspirational luxury mood, 8K ultra detailed, sophisticated composition

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, include negative_prompt, use professional photography models, realistic rendering
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string, emphasize photorealistic quality and historical accuracy
usage_notes.photography_references: Study golden hour luxury travel campaigns from National Geographic, Condé Nast Traveler, high-end fashion campaigns shot on location, medium format photography aesthetics
